title: From Anıtkabir to Seğmenler
description: Spend a themed day in Ankara: Anıtkabir, Seğmenler Park, Kakule Coffee.
notes: Start with a respectful salute at the heart of the Republic.
Take a breather in the valley at the city's center.
Take a peaceful coffee break in the Tunalı area.
Free public restrooms near the park.
